name: ngo-impact-server
description: Backend for NGO Impact Assessment Platform

scripts.fix-db: node -e "const sqlite3=require('sqlite3');const db=new sqlite3.Database('database.sqlite');db.serialize(()=>{['activities','beneficiaries','donations'].forEach(table=>{db.run(`ALTER TABLE ${table} ADD COLUMN user_id INTEGER`,(err)=>{if(err&&!err.message.includes('duplicate'))console.log('Error:',err.message);else console.log(`✅ ${table} ready`);});});setTimeout(()=>{['activities','beneficiaries','donations'].forEach(table=>{db.run(`UPDATE ${table} SET user_id=1 WHERE user_id IS NULL`);});},1000);});setTimeout(()=>db.close(),2000);"
